title: Senior Software Engineer - mfine - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - mfine - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
mfine invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About mfine:
mfine is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine!
